headline: CVS Health Bets On Biosimilars And AI To Support Affordable Care
summary: CVS Health (NYSE:CVS) is rolling out major biosimilar formulary updates that are expected to affect prescription choices and costs across its pharmacy network. The company is expanding acceptance of WIC benefits statewide in Rhode Island for infant formula, broadening access for eligible families. CVS Health is adding new community partnerships and AI-driven initiatives focused on affordability, nutrition, and local health support. For investors tracking NYSE:CVS, these moves sit alongside...

headline: How CVS Health's Transformation Is Facing A Hard Valuation Floor
summary: The most significant insight currently obscured by CVS Health's (CVS) headline revenue growth is a high-stakes transition: the company is attempting to use a temporary surge in insurance profitability to outrun the structural margin pressures facing its pharmacy benefit management (PBM) business.
